channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Signal is being targeted by Russian hackers in a huge new phishing campaign, FBI says
item.description: The campaign is allegedly already a success, as Russians access people's devices.

item.title: Apple could put ads in Maps as soon as this summer
item.description: Apple will soon bring advertisements to its Maps app on mobile and the web, according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The ads, which Apple could reportedly announce this month before rolling them out in the summer, could allow businesses to pay for the highest spot in search results on Apple Maps. That means […]

item.title: Flipper Zero, Everyone’s Favorite Legally Dubious Hacker Tool, Gets an AI Upgrade
item.description: Old-school Flipper fans don't appear to be thrilled about the project.

item.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
item.description: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.

item.title: Trump Recounts the Story of the Man Who Invented the Paper Clip
item.description: "You know the story of the paper clip?" Trump said when asked about ICE and TSA.

item.title: Apple will reportedly start stuffing ads into the Maps app
item.description: Apple is reportedly planning on inserting ads into the Maps app, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. An announcement could come as soon as this month, with the ads themselves appearing on iPhones this summer. This will likely work similarly to ads in Google Maps and Yelp, which lets retailers and brands bid for coverage with particular search queries. I've personally never found the ads in Google Maps to be that annoying, so let's hope Apple's implementation is similar. This potential ad revenue could seriously bolster Apple's services business, which currently generates $100 billion a year...

item.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
item.description: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

item.title: Ce drôle de tandem électrique permet de pédaler avec son enfant à l’avant
item.description: Curiosité du salon CyclingWorld 2026, le tandem électrique Bicicapace, avec son style presque rétro, propose de pédaler à deux, mais avec un enfant à l’avant, tout en proposant une assistance Bosch puissante et moderne.

item.title: Smart Glasses Are Getting Shamed Into Covering Their Cameras
item.description: The Inmo Go 3 has a camera cover that speaks volumes about smart glasses right now.

item.title: This Fan-Made Lego ‘Project Hail Mary’ Rocky Build Is Amaze Amaze Amaze
item.description: A Lego creator figured out how to make Ryan Gosling's bestie out of a $20 'Cute Bunny' set.

item.title: Un petit coup de cœur à 500 euros : voici tout le bien qu’on pense du Nothing Phone (4a) Pro en vidéo
item.description: Nous avons testé le Nothing Phone (4a) Pro, un appareil qui mise sur un design atypique et des caractéristiques alléchantes pour se démarquer. Dans notre vidéo, découvrez comment ce modèle parvient à offrir une expérience très complète sans sacrifier le budget.

item.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing “AI advancements”
item.description: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.

item.title: Why WWDC 2026 Will Be Apple’s Most Important Developer Conference in Years
item.description: Apple has to deliver the repeatedly delayed AI-powered Siri and fix Liquid Glass so it hurts everyone's eyes less.

item.title: GrapheneOS is taking a stand against digital age verification laws — but how long can its defiance last?
item.description: A privacy and security-focused fork of Android — GrapheneOS — is taking a stand against digital age verification laws.

item.title: Goodbye, DJI — US army makes biggest-ever single order of 3,000 Skydio drones worth $52 million and there's one obvious reason why
item.description: DJI is shut out by the US military as it instead picks domestic drone producer Skydio for a huge – and urgent – order.

item.title: I tested the Birdfy Bird Bath Pro for a month — it’s the most entertaining bird cam yet, but there's a catch
item.description: Birdfy branches out from bird feeder cameras with its Bird Bath Pro camera. With dual solar-powered cameras and a fountain, it's a decent foil for a feeder camera, but there are a few quirks for Birdfy to iron out.

item.title: Wing expands its drone delivery service to the Bay Area
item.description: Wing's drone deliveries are coming full circle after adding Bay Area to its service locations. The drone delivery startup has been rapidly expanding to metro areas across the US, but is now targeting the tech-friendly Silicon Valley region. Going back to its inaugural deliveries, Wing ferried office supplies across Google's Mountain View campus in the Bay Area with its automated drones. It was still a startup out of Google's X, The Moonshot Factory incubator at the time, but early users were already asking for home delivery services, according to Wing. Now, Wing's latest delivery drones can de...

item.title: Our Favorite Budget Earbuds Are Literally $19
item.description: Do you need a pair of cheap earbuds? These JLabs are the ones.

item.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
item.description: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new relief program.

item.title: 'If pressed to choose a single TV that fits every viewing need, I would select the LG C5 OLED' — and it's now $1,300 off at Best Buy
item.description: Our TV expert said, 'If pressed to choose a single TV that fits every viewing need, I would select the LG C5 OLED,' and the 65-inch model is $1,300 off at Best Buy right now.

item.title: Attacker Exploits Crypto Stablecoin for a $25 Million Payday
item.description: Resolv Labs was allegedly compromised by someone who got their hands on private AWS keys.

item.title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery could barely hold a charge after getting damaged
item.description: Donut Lab is on a mission to prove to the world its solid-state battery is real, one independent test at a time. We've seen speed charging tests, extreme heat tests, and not-a-supercapacitor tests. Today's test is to see how the battery holds up under damage. The results: While it could barely sustain a charge, it […]

item.title: Lenovo Legion Go S, Dyson V12s Submarine et Oppo Find X9 : les 3 bons plans high‑tech immanquables du lundi 23 mars 2026
item.description: Les bons plans de ce lundi 23 mars 2026 mettent en avant trois produits stars du moment.

item.title: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event starts June 8th
item.description: Apple has set a date for this year's Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC), scheduling the keynote and Platforms State of the Union for June 8th through June 12th at Apple Park. As usual, we will be tuned in to find out what's new in the 2027-branded editions of iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS. After last […]

item.title: On sait quand Apple dévoilera iOS 27… et donnera des nouvelles du nouveau Siri
item.description: Apple organisera son grand événement annuel pour les développeurs du 8 au 12 juin. L'édition 2026 de la WWDC sera l'occasion pour le constructeur de lever le voile sur ses futurs systèmes d'exploitation : iOS 27, macOS 27, etc. Et peut-être aussi donner des nouvelles du Siri dopé à l'IA présenté il y a deux ans ?

item.title: ProtonVPN downloads spiked in 62 countries in 2025 — but with VPNs 'more important than ever' the countries responsible weren't all those you'd expect
item.description: ProtonVPN downloads spiked in 2025 across 65 countries worldwide, with shutdowns and censorship driving the surge

item.title: HP’s Copilot+ 24-inch touchscreen All-in-One for office work is $250 off right now - Best Buy's desktop deal is a home office upgrade
item.description: It’s powered by an AMD Ryzen AI 5 340 processor and 16GB DDR5.

item.title: The internet made BTS. Arirang asks what comes next.
item.description: BTS's new album Arirang reflects a fragmented internet, exploring fandom, virality, and connection in the age of TikTok and digital culture.

item.title: Apple's WWDC 2026 is set for June 8-12
item.description: Apple announced that this year's Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) will take place from June 8-12. The company tends to be consistent with event timing, so it's no surprise that CEO Tim Cook will take the stage for the keynote on June 8, most likely at 1PM ET. Much of WWDC will take place online and will be free to attend, though there will be an in-person component for select developers, students and media at Apple Park in Cupertino, California. You'll be able to take in WWDC via the Apple Developer app, website and YouTube channel. It will also be available in China on the Apple Develo...

item.title: ‘Starfleet Academy’ Will End After Season 2
item.description: The latest 'Star Trek' show, which was renewed for its second season back in 2024, will now come to an end once it's released.

item.title: MSI mini PC deal: Cubi NUC 1MG Mini Desktop 'can handle a decently heavy day of work without a problem' and it's $120 off at Best Buy
item.description: MSI’s Cubi NUC 1MG mini desktop delivers smooth performance for everyday work, multitasking, and media tasks, and it’s down to a great price right now.

item.title: Strava reveals location of French warship after naval officer logs run on aircraft carrier deck
item.description: A French naval officer’s workout session accidentally became a security incident thanks to Strava — here's how to manage your privacy settings to avoid a similar fate.

item.title: PDP’s wireless guitar controller has returned to its best price to date
item.description: The early 2020s were kind of a dark time if you were a fan of Rock Band. PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X owners didn’t get an improved, more feature-packed guitar controller until early 2024 when PDP launched the Riffmaster. While it launched for $129.99 and later rose to $149.99, you can now grab it […]
